creator: johan@headweb.com
text:
Update of the gnarwl port from 3.3 to 3.6
Attached is patchfile; the old files/patch-Makefile.in which was multiple files, have been splited to different files.. Also modified to install .sample files instead of overwriting old ones (ggrr)

--- gnarwl-3.6-patch begins here ---
diff -urN gnarwl-old/Makefile gnarwl/Makefile
--- gnarwl-old/Makefile	2009-07-24 14:46:27.000000000 +0200
+++ gnarwl/Makefile	2009-07-27 15:12:35.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,16 +1,17 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	gnarwl
 # Date created:				Mon Mar 29 2003
 # Whom:					Xavier Beaudouin <kiwi@oav.net>
+# Date updated:		Mon Jul 27 2009
+# Updated:				Johan StrÃ¶m <johan@headweb.com>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/gnarwl/Makefile,v 1.7 2009/01/05 19:04:17 delphij Exp $
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gnarwl
-PORTVERSION=	3.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.6
 PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	mail
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.home.unix-ag.org/patrick/software/gnarwl/ \
-		ftp://ftp.oav.net/pkg_freebsd/distfiles/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.onyxbits.de/sites/default/files/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
